title: Cupid's Chocolates
description:
Jiang Hao Yi is an ordinary high school student whose peaceful life suddenly turns upside down when several girls unexpectedly confess their love to him in front of the entire school. Confused and unable to understand what is happening, he soon discovers that his memories and relationships have been mysteriously altered by magical chocolates connected to a strange cupid-like power. As rumors spread around school, Hao Yi becomes trapped in a complicated web of romance, misunderstandings, and supernatural events.

While trying to uncover the truth behind the mysterious chocolates, Hao Yi finds himself growing closer to multiple girls, each with their own secrets, feelings, and personal struggles. Between awkward romantic situations, comedy, emotional conflicts, and unexpected drama, he must decide how to handle the relationships forming around him while searching for a way to restore normalcy to his life.
